title: psedera
intro: Psedera, also known as the 'Veld Grape' or 'Wild Grape', is a type of vine that belongs to the family Vitaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of psedera include its ability to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Psedera can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile remedy in folk medicine.
